headline: GameStop Proposes To Acquire eBay For $55.5 Billion: GME CEO To Lead Combined Entity
summary: GameStop proposes to acquire eBay for $125/share in a cash-and-stock deal, valuing the retail chain at $55.5 billion.

raw.headline: GameStop Proposes To Acquire eBay For $55.5 Billion: GME CEO To Lead Combined Entity
raw.summary: GameStop proposes to acquire eBay for $125/share in a cash-and-stock deal, valuing the retail chain at $55.5 billion.

headline: GameStop offers to buy eBay for about $56 billion
summary: GameStop said on Sunday that it has proposed to buy all common shares of eBay Inc for about $56 billion.  CEO Ryan Cohen, GameStop's largest investor, said the offer price ‌is $125 a share in a 50-50 mix of cash and stock.  Based on eBay's Friday close, ‌the bid represents a premium of about 20%.

raw.headline: GameStop offers to buy eBay for about $56 billion
raw.summary: GameStop said on Sunday that it has proposed to buy all common shares of eBay Inc for about $56 billion.  CEO Ryan Cohen, GameStop's largest investor, said the offer price ‌is $125 a share in a 50-50 mix of cash and stock.  Based on eBay's Friday close, ‌the bid represents a premium of about 20%.

headline: GameStop makes unsolicited offer to buy eBay for about $56 billion, WSJ reports
summary: GameStop has made an unsolicited offer to acquire U.S. online marketplace eBay Inc for about $56 billion, the Wall ‌Street Journal reported on Sunday, citing an interview with GameStop ‌CEO Ryan Cohen.  GameStop has built a roughly 5% stake in eBay and is offering $125 a ​share in cash and stock, Cohen told the WSJ.  The offer represents a premium of about 20% to eBay's last closing price on Friday.

headline: GameStop Offering To Buy EBay For $56 Billion: WSJ
summary: GameStop is preparing to bid for e-commerce giant eBay, the Wall Street Journal reported late Friday. GameStop stock rose after hours while eBay soared.

headline: Dow Jones Futures Due Without Weekend Surprise; Apple, Broadcom In Buy Zones
summary: The stock market rebounded late last week after a short pause. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq are at highs while Apple and Broadcom are in buy zones.

headline: 2 Reasons GameStop Should Buy eBay, 1 Reason It Won't
summary: A major deal could be in the works, but don't assume it will happen.

headline: PayPal's Epic Fall In Numbers
summary: PayPal has transitioned from a high-growth Wall Street darling to a value stock with stagnant user and revenue growth. Read the latest analysis on PYPL stock here.
